policy: An exact English value or technical source token is allowed only when the German UI should preserve a proper name, identifier, acronym, code, or genuinely identical German term. A whole-message exception records messageId, reason, and decision=preserve-exact-english; the ignored local catalog confirmation approves the current scope without writing reviewer identity or date here. This file is a machine policy, not an evidence bibliography.

preservedTokens.reason: Product and workflow acronym used alongside German explanatory copy.
Domain acronym used alongside German explanatory copy.
Domain acronym used alongside German explanatory copy.

mappedTokens.reason: Use the established German abbreviation unless the source is a reviewed brand or immutable runtime token.

sourcePatternTokens.reason: Best Available Technique enumeration token; requires domain confirmation before German approval.

runtimeOnlyCategories: ICU placeholder names and control tokens
backend enum values rendered only as interpolation values
UUIDs, versions, file names, and paths
units, mathematical variables, and chemical symbols
unknown dynamic values handled by localized fallback messages
